name: Brown County Community YMCA
description: Come play pickleball at Brown County Community YMCA in Nashville, IN! There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Stevens Valley
description: Come play pickleball at Stevens Valley in Nashville, IN! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are private.
